channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Please collect litter along the road here, 16th May
item.description:
Litter to collect along here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please clear litter from around the bus stop, 16th May
item.description:
Needs sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The street lamp outside 39 St Andrews Road has gone out, 15th May
item.description:
This has o ly just occurred but leaves a large dark area and feels unsafe at night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, St. Andrew's Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been parked here for over 7 months., 15th May
item.description:
The car has been parked here for the past 8 months. It has no insurance since October and has no road tax since March.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keyworth Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pizza Express signs too bright, 15th May
item.description:
The light-up signs for Pizza Express are incredibly bright at night, especially when compared to all other sources of light in the area. Unsure if there's a limit to such things, but since the business closes at around 11:30 PM, it would be ideal if they turned off the lights after this time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, New Globe Walk, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car next to tree on Hampden Aveneue, 15th May
item.description:
Car has been there for 2.5 weeks without moving (as you enter Hampden Avenue from Hampden Road). Looks like whoever left it there has snapped a tree large tree branch too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hampden Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring pothole, 15th May
item.description:
I reported this pothole a few weeks ago. It is now much worse. It is a recurrent pothole which appeared a couple of years back after a hole was dug to install wiring. I believe that the road foundation has been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Elm Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree support needs repair, 15th May
item.description:
This young tree has been supported by two posts with ties. The ties have torn and the tree needs new supporting ties please. We have put temporary supporting ties in place to help the tree in the meantime.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 15th May
item.description:
Parking on double yellow lines in front of ‘House of Flavor’/City Walk Apartments

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Perry Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal nails and screws on Verney road, 15th May
item.description:
There are lots of construction work and industrial complexes near Verney road, which often result in construction litter being left on this road. I live nearby and drive through this road often and over last 3 months had to change all four tires on my car as a result of nails and screw punctures. Today I took a short walk on this road and found 9 metal screws (which I picked up and disposed)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verney Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th May
item.description:
Fridge full of food

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Simnel Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked roadside drain, 15th May
item.description:
The roadside drain on the left heading up the hill past the houses on Hyde Vale is blocked
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hyde Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin abandoned on street, 15th May
item.description:
Bin abandoned on street, with and it’s attracting the abandonement of other trash such as a laughing gas canister and an old ruck sack

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Princess Road NW6, 15th May
item.description:
Furniture, Chairs Another FLY TIP. It’s been there for a couple of weeks NO ONE has TURNED UP to CLEAR IT. It’s been filled day by day. Brent has a BIG PROBLEM NOW with LITTER and FLYTIPS. They have CUT the SERVICE of the Estate cleaners and Street Cleaners. It’s called Flexible Cleaning in fact it’s NON EXISTENT Cleaning. The Streets are FLITHY and DIRTY and you see NO Street Cleaners ANYMORE. Reporting it NO ONE is TURNING UP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: New graffiti, 15th May
item.description:
New graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 153 Granville Road NW6 5AR, 15th May
item.description:
I received a Email from fix my street on 14.5.26 to say NO FURTHER ACTION. Went to look today 15.5.26 and The FLY TIP HAS MORE ADDED. I have reported this NOW about 5 TIMES ITS DISGRACEFUL People are LYING saying it’s been cooked and it’s STILL THERE. Who is in charge of THIS? The STREET is NOW LOADED with Furniture what is going on? FIX IT and REMOVE IT. STOP THE LIES. Residents are living with these Fly tips from Chichester. Road, Princess Road and Granville Road NW6, Mattresses, Furniture STREWN on the Street and NO ONE coming to REMOVE IT. Come to this address AGAIN and SEE A HUGE FLY TIP that NEEDS ACTION.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Fly posting of a company advert, 15th May
item.description:
Fly posting of a company advert on public lamp post

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Bird in Hand Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped boat and trailer, 15th May
item.description:
Dumped boat vehicle trailer no lights reflectors likely to be hazard to road users and pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 15th May
item.description:
There is a jaguar car that has been parked for a lengthy period of time without being moved from Larkfield Road (DA14 6RF), which is located facing no.25/27 which does not belong to anyone who lives in the street. It is evident it's been abandoned. Can someone please look in to this matter in case the car has been stolen? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkfield Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
This lazy driver had no regards of concerns for pedestrians… because he wanted to deliver items for his new flat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
